Hello, I'm Kreat crafting the web, one pixel at a time

// Profile

About
Me


Hey there! I'm Kreat — a passionate frontend developer who lives at the intersection of logic and aesthetics. I believe every great interface starts with great thinking.

My journey began in the low-level world of C and C++, where I trained my mind to solve problems efficiently and think in systems. That foundation gives me a superpower most frontend devs don't have — I write JavaScript that's fast, clean, and bug-resistant.

On the visual side, CSS is my playground. From micro-animations to complex grid layouts, I obsess over the details that make the difference between a site that's just functional and one that feels alive.
